name: Finifugality
descs:
[Effects apply only to #1, #2 Deployed Identities]

Turn Start: allies with 10+ (sum of [Breath] Potency and Count) gain Clash Power +1 and 1 [AttackDmgUp].

At 20+ sum, gain Clash Power +1 and 3 [AttackDmgUp] instead.

At 40+ sum, gain Clash Power +2 and 3 [AttackDmgUp] instead.
